title: heteropterys orinocensis var. eglandulosa
intro:
Heteropterys orinocensis var. eglandulosa, commonly known as "Cannonball Tree" or "Monkey's Brush", is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of Heteropterys orinocensis var. eglandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
